description_long: This is an electric guitar with a highly stylized, aggressive body shape featuring sharp, angular contours and a pointed lower horn. The body is finished in a vibrant, swirling blue and yellow pattern, giving it a psychedelic and eye-catching appearance. The front face displays two red humbucker pickups, a red bridge, and red control knobs, all contrasting with the patterned body. The neck is long and slender, with a dark fretboard and white fret markers, leading up to a dramatic headstock with pointed tips and six tuning pegs, three on each side. The back of the guitar reveals a wooden neck and a matching patterned rear body, with a red electronics cavity cover. The overall design suggests a modern, metal-inspired instrument intended to stand out visually in urban music scenes.
description: A striking electric guitar with a sharp, angular body and a swirling blue and yellow finish, featuring red hardware and a dramatic pointed headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned body, two red humbucker pickups, red bridge, and control knobs, with the full fretboard and pointed headstock visible.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim body and neck thickness, with hardware and patterned finish visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden neck, patterned back, and red electronics cavity cover, with the headstock's tuning pegs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the slimness of the guitar and the continuation of the patterned finish along the edge.
attribute_headstock_design: Pointed headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and dramatic cutouts.
